title: Wave 1.5: awk portability fix in eval-verdict-compiler.sh int_ge
description: int_ge() in hooks/eval-verdict-compiler.sh uses awk syntax that's portably-fragile on macOS BSD awk vs GNU awk. Replace awk-based comparison with bash native: [ "$a" -ge "$b" ]. The threshold-breach branch (harmful>=3 + utility<0.3) currently emits an awk syntax error on Mac (does not break Wave 1 loop closure but pollutes logs).

title: Wave 1.5: extract lib/finding-compiler-helpers.sh
description: Per pre-mortem H3, extract note/warn/write_atomic/slugify/derive_dedup_key/extract_markdown_body/frontmatter_json_from_markdown/relative_to_root from hooks/finding-compiler.sh into lib/finding-compiler-helpers.sh. Refactor finding-compiler.sh to source the lib. Update hooks/eval-verdict-compiler.sh to source the lib (drops 3 inlined helpers). Existing tests/skills/test-finding-registry-flow.sh must remain green.

title: Wave 1.5: doc-index entry for eval-verdict-pipeline
description: docs/documentation-index.md missing entry for docs/contracts/eval-verdict-pipeline.md (Edit failed pre-read in original Wave 1 commit). Add as a sibling line to the finding-registry contract entry under the Contracts section.

title: Wave 1.5: extend test-eval-verdict-compiler.sh to 9 PASS markers
description: Add 4 missing assertions per plan rev 2: (a) regressed verdict mutates utility downward + increments harmful_count; (b) harmful_count>=3 + utility<0.3 queues next-work entry (covers the awk fix from Wave 1.5 awk-portability item); (c) re-running compiler on processed manifest is no-op (idempotency via watermark); (d) crash-between-mutation-and-watermark replays cleanly. Currently 5+2 PASS = 7; target 9.

title: Wave 1.5: --reconcile mode stub for eval-verdict-compiler.sh
description: Plan rev 2 noted --reconcile mode as Wave-1.5 follow-up: re-derive corpus state from full manifest history (not just newer-than-watermark). Just the flag + a TODO that errors with 'not yet implemented' if invoked. Wave 2+ provides real implementation.

title: Wave 1.5: post-Wave-1 SCHEMA.md content_hash recompute
description: ~/.agents/evals/SCHEMA.md was modified for rc3 (commit de37b48 in evals repo). Per the rc3 entry rationale, content_hash should be recomputed and cited in section 11 entry 18. Currently entry 18 documents the BUMP but doesn't carry the post-bump hash. Compute via the _validator's canonicalization pipeline; record alongside.

title: Wave 1.5: cross-vendor Codex review of eval-corpus plan rev 2
description: Pre-mortem ran 5 Claude judges; --mixed cross-vendor (Codex) was deferred to a pre-/crank gate. Now post-/crank: run bushido codex review against the 8 council FAIL patterns. Capture verdict + findings into .agents/council/2026-05-01-pre-mortem-eval-corpus-codex-attempt-1.md. If Codex flags issues, queue follow-ups.

title: Wave 2 starter: capture-sidecar privacy-redaction policy doc
description: Wave 2 needs explicit privacy posture before any real ~/dev/* sessions get captured. Write docs/contracts/eval-capture-sidecar-privacy.md: redaction patterns (envvar-looking strings, AWS keys, GitHub tokens, JWT-shape strings, PII regex), local-only-storage policy, per-repo opt-in mechanism (~/.agents/evals/capture-allowlist.txt with absolute repo paths), kill-switch (env var AGENTOPS_CAPTURE_DISABLED=1).
